Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod &CreFilPgt = &Context.FilCod retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATARECEBER', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &DuplicatasAutNiv) if &DuplicatasAutNiv < 2 btnuserInserir.Visible = 0 &UserUpdate.Visible = 0 Endif RetornaConfSistema.call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon020_ClientePadraoVista,&TCon020_ClientePadraoVista) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &IsMostrarJuros.TooltipText = "JUROS/ANTECIPAÇÃO" UnnamedTable4.Width = 35 &TotCreVlrSdo.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &CreFrpPgtoTip1 = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &CreFrpPgtoTip2 = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &CreFrpPgtoTip3 = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) ddo_Expp.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnExpp.InternalName &ExppData = new() &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Novo Adiantamento' &ExppDataItem.Link = WPAdiantamentoPedidos.Link('WWDuplicataReceber') &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar Excel' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar PDF' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &CreSts = nullvalue(&CreSts) &CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber &auxCreFrpPgtoTip = nullvalue(&auxCreFrpPgtoTip) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'A RECEBER' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Vct.Cres.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Vct.Dec.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Número') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Cód.Cliente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Nom.Cliente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Número') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Emissão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Vencim.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Cobrança') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'Valor') &OrderedBy.AddItem(11, 'Núm.Bloqueto') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) BtnMarcar.Caption = 'Marcar' BtnMarcar.Tooltiptext = 'Marcar' &IsTodosMarcados = true &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Clear() PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'WWDuplicataReceber', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &Hoje = serverdate() If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() and &PadDtaMod = &Hoje &CrePagDta = ctod(Substr(&PadObs,1,10)) Endif if &CrePagDta.IsEmpty() &CrePagDta = &Hoje Endif if &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty() &CreDtaVct_To = &Hoje // Data do Crédito EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'wwDuplicataReceberColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwDuplicataReceberColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf CreFrpPgtoNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible &CreNovCliRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible &CreDupNroWithTags.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible CreDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible CreDtaVct.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible CreDtaCob.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible CreDtaPrmPag.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible CreVlrDup.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &CreVlrSdoWithTags.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible &CreVlrJur.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible &CreVlrPgt.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible &CreTipBxa.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible &AuxPedido.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible CreVenCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(14).IsVisible CreBloNro.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(15).IsVisible CreCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(16).IsVisible CreCbrCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(17).IsVisible CreFilPgt.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(18).IsVisible FilCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(19).IsVisible &Salvar.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(20).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load Do CAse CAse CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET and CreCheCod <> 0 &UserUpdate.Link = wpLancarCheque1.Link('ADD', EmpCod, CreCheCod) CAse CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP and CreCheCod <> 0 &UserUpdate.Link = wpLancarChequeProprio.Link('ADD', EmpCod, CreCheCod) Otherwise &UserUpdate.Link = addDUplicatas.Link('WWDUPLICATARECEBER', 'UPD', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) EndCase CreDtaVct.ForeColor = IIF(CreDtaVct < &Today,RGB(255,0,0),RGB(0,0,0)) if CrePedCod <> 0 &AuxPedido.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod,FilCod,CrePedCod) Else &AuxPedido.Link = '' Endif &CreDupNroWithTags.LinkTarget = '_blank' &CreDupNroWithTags.Link = VerDuplicata.Link('wwDuplicataReceber', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UserUpdate = !'' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &DoImprimir = !'' if CreNovCliRaz_Formula.Length() > 30 &CreNovCliRaz = substr(CreNovCliRaz_Formula, 1, 30) + '...' Else &CreNovCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz_Formula EndIf if CreAbvDup.IsEmpty() or CreAbvDup.IsNull() AtualizaSaldoDuplicata.Call(EmpCod, CreCod, FilCod) &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup_FORMULA Else &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup Endif &CreDupNroWithTags = CreDupNro If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DINHEIRO &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.PIX &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DEPOSITO &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf &CreVlrSdoWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &CreVlrSdoWithTags = trim(CreVlrSdo.ToFormattedString()) If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.DESCONTADA &CreVlrSdoWithTags += format(!"", "DUPLICATA DESCONTADA") EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PesFan = RetornaNomeFantasiaPessoa.udp(EmpCod, CreCliCod) &CreNovCliRaz.TooltipText = 'FANTASIA: ' + trim(&PesFan) &AuxCreCod = CreCod &CreDupSel = False &CreVlrPgt = 0 &CreVlrJur = 0 &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total Do 'IsSelecionado' &OldCreTipBxa = &CreTipBxa &OldCreVlrJur = &CreVlrJur &OldCreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt if &CreDupSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &CreVlrJur.Enabled = True &CreVlrPgt.Enabled = true &CreTipBxa.Enabled = true Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &CreVlrJur.Enabled = false &CreVlrPgt.Enabled = false &CreTipBxa.Enabled = false Endif if CreVlrSdo <> CreVlrDup &CreVlrSdoWithTags.ForeColor = RGB(255,100,0) Else &CreVlrSdoWithTags.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) Endif &CreVlrSdoWithTags.TooltipText = 'VALOR DUPLICATA: R$ '+ trim(toformattedString(CreVlrDup)) EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'wwDuplicataReceberColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DouserInserir' addDUplicatas.Link('WWDUPLICATARECEBER', 'INS', 0,0,0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' do 'MarcaDesmarca' do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSaldo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWSaldo.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Expp.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBaixar' padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'HAVERSERLECIONADO_CTR', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) If &Context.PesCod < 0 &auxPesCod = &Context.PesCod*-1 Else &auxPesCod = &Context.PesCod EndIf &PedCod = val(str(Year(&Today))+str(&auxPesCod))*-1 ApagaTemporariaPedidoDuplicata.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &PedCod, &Context.PesCod, &PedTmpFrpPgtoTip) do 'GravaPadrao' If not &CrePagDta.IsEmpty() If &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Count = 0 msg('Nenhum Registro selecionado!') Else If (&TotDescontada > 0 and &TotNaoDescontada = 0) or (&TotNaoDescontada > 0 and &TotDescontada = 0) &WebSession.Set('WWDuplicataReceber',&SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Toxml()) // If &Context.Old_Perfil = 3 RecebimentoDuplicata_JDF.Call(&CreFilPgt,&CrePagDta,'WWDuplicataReceber') // Else // RecebimentoDuplicata_TTS.Call(&CreFilPgt,&CrePagDta,'WWDuplicataReceber') // Endif Else msg('Não é permitido baixar duplicatas do status "Descontada" com Duplicatas Normais!') EndiF EndIF Else msg('Data do pagamento não pode ser vazia!') &CrePagDta = &Hoje &CrePagDta.SetFocus() EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoListagem' iF &SdtpagamentoDuplicata.Count > 0 GravaSessaoWpTipoImpressao.Call('DUP_RECEBER',&EmpCod,0,0,0,0,&ServerTime,'','') wpTipoImpressao.PopUp() Refresh Else msg('Não foram encontradas nenhuma duplicata selecionada para impressão!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreFrpPgtoNom", '', !'Forma', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CreNovCliRaz", '', !'Nome Cliente', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDupNro", '', !'Número', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaVct", '', !'Vencim.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaCob", '', !'Cobrança', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaPrmPag", '', !'1ºPgto', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreVlrDup", '', !'Valor', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreVlrSdo", '', !'À Receber', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CreVlrJur", '', !'Juros', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CreVlrPgt", '', !'Recebeu?', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CreTipBxa", '', !'Tipo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxPedido", '', !'Origem', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreVenCod", '', !'Vnd.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreBloNro", '', !'Núm.Bloqueto', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreCod", '', !'Seq.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreCbrCod", '', !'LC', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreFilPgt", '', !'F. Pgt', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"FilCod", '', !'F. Lct', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&Salvar", '', !'', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwDuplicataReceberColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro1.Visible = False &CreCbrCod1.Visible = False &CreCbrNom1.Visible = False &CreVenCod1.Visible = False &CreBloNro1.Visible = False &CreVlrDup1.Visible = False &CreFrpPgtoTip1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro2.Visible = False &CreCbrCod2.Visible = False &CreCbrNom2.Visible = False &CreVenCod2.Visible = False &CreBloNro2.Visible = False &CreVlrDup2.Visible = False &CreFrpPgtoTip2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro3.Visible = False &CreCbrCod3.Visible = False &CreCbrNom3.Visible = False &CreVenCod3.Visible = False &CreBloNro3.Visible = False &CreVlrDup3.Visible = False &CreFrpPgtoTip3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLICOD" &CreCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLIRAZ" &CreCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREISPER" &CreIsPer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRESTS" &CreSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRERECPAG" &CreRecPag.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREVLRSDO" &CreVlrSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"AUXCREFRPPGTOTIP" &auxCreFrpPgtoTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREFILPGT" &CreFilPgt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDTAVCT" &CreDtaVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CreDtaVct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLICOD", "", not &CreCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLIRAZ", "", not &CreCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREISPER", "", not &CreIsPer.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreIsPer.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRESTS", "", not &CreSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRERECPAG", "", true, 0, &CreRecPag, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREVLRSDO", "", not &CreVlrSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreVlrSdo.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"AUXCREFRPPGTOTIP", "", not &auxCreFrpPgtoTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &auxCreFrpPgtoTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREFILPGT", "", not &CreFilPgt.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreFilPgt.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREDTAVCT", "", not (&CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() AND &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &CreDtaVct.ToString().Trim(), &CreDtaVct_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' AND not &CreVenCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVenCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' AND not &CreBloNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreBloNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' AND not &CreFrpPgtoTip1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreFrpPgtoTip1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVENCOD' AND not &CreVenCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVenCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREBLONRO' AND not &CreBloNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreBloNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' AND not &CreFrpPgtoTip2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreFrpPgtoTip2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVENCOD' AND not &CreVenCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVenCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREBLONRO' AND not &CreBloNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreBloNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' AND not &CreFrpPgtoTip3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreFrpPgtoTip3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Duplicatas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwDuplicataReceber.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwDuplicataReceber.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'DoPDF' Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = RelatorioDuplicataReceber_Total_PDF.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.Fullscreen = true InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() EndEvent Event &CreDtaVct.IsValid If not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() and &CreDtaVct_To < &CreDtaVct &CreDtaVct_To = &CreDtaVct EndIf EndEvent Event &CreVlrJur.IsValid if &OldCreVlrJur <> &CreVlrJur if &CreVlrJur < 0 &CreVlrJur = 0 EndIF If &CreDupSel = True and (&CreVlrJur <> 0 or (&CreVlrPgt > CreVlrSdo)) &CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo+&CreVlrJur EndIf For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata If &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrJur = &CreVlrJur Exit EndIf EndFor do 'GravaSelecionadas' &OldCreVlrJur = &CreVlrJur &OldCreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt Endif EndEvent Event &CreVlrPgt.IsValid if &OldCreVlrPgt <> &CreVlrPgt If &CreVlrPgt > CreVlrSdo and &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total and &CreDupSel = True &CreVlrJur = &CreVlrPgt - CreVlrSdo EndIf If &CreVlrPgt < CreVlrSdo and &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total and &CreDupSel = True &CreVlrDsc = CreVlrSdo-&CrevlrPgt EndIf For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata If &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrJur = &CreVlrJur &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrDsc = &CreVlrDsc Exit EndIf EndFor do 'GravaSelecionadas' &OldCreVlrJur = &CreVlrJur &OldCreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt Endif EndEvent Event &CreTipBxa.IsValid if &OldCreTipBxa <> &CreTipBxa For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata If &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa = &CreTipBxa &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt If &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Parcial &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrDsc = 0 EndIf Exit EndIf EndFor do 'GravaSelecionadas' &OldCreTipBxa = &CreTipBxa Endif EndEvent Event 'Prompt' 4 PromptCliente.Popup(&EmpCod, &CreCliCod) EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click if &CreDupSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &CreDupSel = false &CreVlrJur.Enabled = false &CreVlrPgt.Enabled = false &CreTipBxa.Enabled = false Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &CreDupSel = true &CreVlrJur.Enabled = True &CreVlrPgt.Enabled = true &CreTipBxa.Enabled = true Endif If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA If &CreDupSel = True &CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo If &IsMostrarJuros = true CalculaJuros.Call(EmpCod,CreCbrJurCod,CreDtaVct,&CrePagDta, CreVlrSdo,&CreVlrJur, CbrMltVlr, &MoraMoeda) &CreVlrJur += &MoraMoeda If &CreVlrJur <> 0 &CreVlrPgt += &CreVlrJur EndIF Endif &mensagem = '' If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.DESCONTADA // CreSts = 'D' = Descontadas &mensagem += 'DUPLICATAS DESCONTADAS/NEGOCIADAS, NÃO VÃO GERAR CRÉDITOS NO CAIXA!' + NewLine() Endif &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem = new() &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCheCod = CreCheCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCod = CreCliCod If CreNovCliRaz.isempty() or CreNovCliRaz.isnull() &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz = CreCliRaz Else &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz Endif &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovFunCod = CreFunCodVal &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreNovCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCodRaz = Trim(str(CreCliCod))+'-'+trim(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrJur = &CreVlrJur If val(&TCon020_ClientePadraoVista) = CreCliCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCpl = 'RECBTO DP.CLI.' + trim(str(CreCliCod)) + ' - CONSUMIDOR[' + trim(substr(CreNovCliRaz,1, 20))+']' Else &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCpl = 'RECBTO DP.CLI.' + trim(str(CreCliCod)) + ' - ' + trim(substr(CreCliRaz,1, 20)) EndIf &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.JurCod = CreCbrJurCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CbrMltVlr = CbrMltVlr &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCbrCod = CreCbrCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePedCod = CrePedCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDupNro = CreDupNro &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaEms = CreDtaEms &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagDta = &CrePagDta &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreEnvSpc = CreEnvSpc if CreAbvDup.IsEmpty() or CreAbvDup.IsNull() &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Origem = CreAbvDup_FORMULA Else &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Origem = CreAbvDup Endif // &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCpl = trim(str(CreCliCod)) + ' - ' + trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreSts = CreSts &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCod = CrePlanCod RetornaPlanCodNomVir.Call(EmpCod, CrePlanCod, &PLanCodNomVir) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCodNomVir = &PLanCodNomVir &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.UtilizaDataVcto = Status_SimNao.Nao &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCtaBanCod = 0 &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovDtaCon = &DataVazia &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreFilPgt = CreFilPgt // VALIDA SERASA If Not CreEnvSpc.IsEmpty() &mensagem += 'ATENÇÃO! Cliente:'+ Substr(trim(CreCliRaz), 1, 30) + ' Esta no SPC por esta empresa!' + NewLine() EndIf &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Mensagem = &mensagem // VALIDA TIPO BAIXA If &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Parcial and &CrevlrPgt >= CreVlrSdo &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total EndIF If &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total and &CrevlrPgt < CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrDsc = CreVlrSdo-&CrevlrPgt EndIf &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa = &CreTipBxa //&CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Add(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem) else For &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtPagamentoDuplicata If &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &Index = &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.IndexOf(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem) &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total &CreVlrPgt = 0 &CreVlrJur = 0 Endif Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Esta Duplicata está Cancelada e não pode ser selecionada. Verifique! ') EndIf do 'GravaSelecionadas' &OldCreVlrJur = &CreVlrJur &OldCreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt &OldCreTipBxa = &CreTipBxa &CreVlrPgt.SetFocus() EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Clear() do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh EndEvent Event &CreFilPgt.Click &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Clear() do 'GravaSelecionadas' EndEvent Event &IsMostrarJuros.click if &IsMostrarJuros = true For &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtPagamentoDuplicata &CreVlrJur = 0 &MoraMoeda = 0 CalculaJuros.Call(&Context.EmpCod,&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.JurCod, &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaVct,&CrePagDta, &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo, &CreVlrJur, &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CbrMltVlr, &MoraMoeda) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrJur += &CreVlrJur + &MoraMoeda &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo + &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrJur EndFor Else For &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtPagamentoDuplicata &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrJur = 0 &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo EndFor EndIf do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh EndEvent Event &CrePagDta.ControlValueChanged Do 'GravaPadrao' EndEvent Event &DoImprimir.Click If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA msg('ATENÇÃO! Duplicata cancelada verifique!') Else Do case Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &sdtGerarBoleto.Clear() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem) GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) If &IsErro = false RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto and CreBloNro <> '' and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA //BANCO ENVIA AND COM REGISTRO &sdtGerarBoleto.Clear() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem) GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) If &IsErro = false RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirDuplicata and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &sdtDuplicata.Clear() &sdtDuplicatasItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtDuplicatasItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtDuplicatasItem.FilCod = FilCod &sdtDuplicata.Add(&sdtDuplicatasItem) &webSession.Set('IMPRIMEDUPLICATA',&sdtDuplicata.ToXml()) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS019.link(EmpCod,FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.NaoFazerNada or CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA Msg('ATENÇÃO! Tipo de impressão no local de cobrança selecionado como "NADA A FAZER", altere o tipo de impressão caso necessário.') EndCase EndIf EndEvent Sub 'MarcaDesmarca' For Each using DSwwDuplicataReceber(&CreCliCod, &CreCliRaz, &CreIsPer, &CreSts, &CreRecPag, &CreVlrSdo, &CreFrpPgtoTip, &CreFilPgt, &CreDtaVct, &CreDtaVct_To, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &DynamicFiltersOperator1, &CreDupNro1, &CreCbrCod1, &CreCbrNom1, &CreVenCod1, &CreBloNro1, &CreVlrDup1, &CreFrpPgtoTip1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &DynamicFiltersOperator2, &CreDupNro2,&CreCbrCod2, &CreCbrNom2, &CreVenCod2, &CreBloNro2, &CreVlrDup2, &CreFrpPgtoTip2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &DynamicFiltersOperator3, &CreDupNro3, &CreCbrCod3, &CreCbrNom3, &CreVenCod3, &CreBloNro3, &CreVlrDup3, &CreFrpPgtoTip3) defined by CreDupNro If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA &CreDupSel = true &CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo If &IsMostrarJuros = true CalculaJuros.Call(EmpCod,CreCbrJurCod,CreDtaVct,&CrePagDta, CreVlrSdo,&CreVlrJur, CbrMltVlr, &MoraMoeda) &CreVlrJur += &MoraMoeda If &CreVlrJur <> 0 &CreVlrPgt += &CreVlrJur EndIF Endif &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total &mensagem = '' If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.DESCONTADA // CreSts = 'D' = Descontadas &mensagem += 'DUPLICATAS DESCONTADAS/NEGOCIADAS, NÃO VÃO GERAR CRÉDITOS NO CAIXA!' + NewLine() Endif &IsAchou = false For &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtPagamentoDuplicata If &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod and &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &IsAchou = true EndIf EndFor If &IsAchou = false &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem = new() &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCheCod = CreCheCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCod = CreCliCod If CreNovCliRaz.isempty() or CreNovCliRaz.isnull() &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz = CreCliRaz Else &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz Endif &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCodRaz = Trim(str(CreCliCod))+'-'+trim(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrJur = &CreVlrJur if CreAbvDup.IsEmpty() or CreAbvDup.IsNull() &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Origem = CreAbvDup_FORMULA Else &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Origem = CreAbvDup Endif &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.JurCod = CreCbrJurCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CbrMltVlr = CbrMltVlr &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCbrCod = CreCbrCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePedCod = CrePedCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDupNro = CreDupNro &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaEms = CreDtaEms &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagDta = &CrePagDta &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreEnvSpc = CreEnvSpc &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCpl = trim(str(CreCliCod)) + ' - ' + trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreSts = CreSts &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCod = CrePlanCod RetornaPlanCodNomVir.Call(EmpCod, CrePlanCod, &PLanCodNomVir) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCodNomVir = &PLanCodNomVir &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.UtilizaDataVcto = Status_SimNao.Nao &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCtaBanCod = 0 &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovDtaCon = &DataVazia &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreFilPgt = CreFilPgt // VALIDA SERASA If Not CreEnvSpc.IsEmpty() &mensagem += 'ATENÇÃO! Cliente:'+ Substr(trim(CreCliRaz), 1, 30) + ' Esta no SPC por esta empresa!' + NewLine() EndIf &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Mensagem = &mensagem // VALIDA TIPO BAIXA If &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Parcial and &CrevlrPgt >= CreVlrSdo &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total EndIF If &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total and &CrevlrPgt < CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrDsc = CreVlrSdo-&CrevlrPgt EndIf &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa = &CreTipBxa &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Add(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem) EndIF Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Esta Duplicata está Cancelada e não pode ser selecionada. Verifique! ') EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', 'SEL_WWDuplicataReceber', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &SdtpagamentoDuplicata.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'Totaliza' EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata If &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = &AuxCreCod &CreDupSel = true &CreVlrPgt = &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt &CreVlrJur = &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrJur &CreTipBxa = &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa exit EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'GravaSelecionadas' padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'SEL_WWDuplicataReceber', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod,serverNow(),'T') do 'Totaliza' EndSub Sub 'Totaliza' &numeric = &SdtpagamentoDuplicata.Count &TotNaoDescontada = 0 &TotDescontada = 0 &TotCreVlrSdo = 0 For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata &TotCreVlrSdo += &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt If &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreSts = Status_Duplicata.DESCONTADA //DESCONTADA &TotDescontada += 1 Else &TotNaoDescontada += 1 EndIF EndFor DuplicatasSelect.Caption = format('%1 - DUPLICATAS = R$ %2', trim(ToformattedString(&numeric)), trim(toformattedString(&TotCreVlrSdo))) EndSub Sub 'GravaPadrao' &PadObs = DTOC(&CrePagDta) padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'WWDuplicataReceber', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
